headline: Is It Too Late To Consider Caterpillar (CAT) After A 105% One Year Surge?
summary: If you are wondering whether Caterpillar at around US$680 per share still offers value, the starting point is to understand how its current price lines up against different valuation methods. The stock has had a strong 1 year return of 105.6%, while the 7 day return shows a 1.9% decline and the 30 day return shows a 9.5% decline. These sit alongside a 13.8% gain year to date, a very large 3 year return of 229.4%, and a 5 year return of 225.3%. These moves have kept Caterpillar on many...
